requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be read along with the 'Guidelines on Acquisition and Holding
of Shares or Voting Rights in Banking Companies' issued by the Reserve Bank of India
(hereinafter referred to as 'Guidelines').
requirements.object: the 'Guidelines on Acquisition and Holding of Shares or Voting Rights in Banking Companies' issued by the Reserve Bank of India (he

requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks
- Acquisition and Holding of Shares or Voting Rights) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Acquisition and Holding of Shares or Voting Rights) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall become effective on the day these are placed on the official
website of the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: day these are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be applicable to Small Finance Banks,
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'Banking companies or banks' and
individually, as a 'Banking Company or bank').
requirements.object: Finance Banks, (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'Banking companies or banks' and individually, as a 'Banking Company or

requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms used shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below, and their cognate expressions and
variations shall be construed accordingly:
(1) 'acquisition' means acquiring, or agreeing to acquire, shares or voting rights in
a banking company, directly or indirectly;
requirements.object: to them below, and their cognate expressions and variations shall be construed accordingly: (1) 'acquisition' means acquiri

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (i) 'Shares' shall include equity shares and preference shares, as
mentioned in Section 12(1) (ii) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
requirements.object: preference shares, as mentioned in Section 12(1) (ii) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (ii) The term 'indirectly' shall have the same meaning as provided in
Explanation III to Rule 2(h) of Companies (Significant Beneficial Owners) Rules,
2018.
requirements.object: as provided in Explanation III to Rule 2(h) of Companies (Significant Beneficial Owners) Rules, 2018

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'aggregate holding' means the total holding, directly or indirectly, beneficial or
otherwise, of shares or voting rights by a person along with his relatives,
associate enterprises and persons acting in concert with him in a banking
company;
requirements.object: or indirectly, beneficial or otherwise, of shares or voting rights by a person along with his relatives, associate enterpr

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of this definition, indirect acquisition of shares or voting rights by
a person (natural or legal) may include, amongst others, such acquisition by:
Explanation: The term 'under the same management or control or owner' shall
illustratively include entities related to one or more other entities because they
all have the same shareholder structure without a single controlling shareholder
or because they are managed on a unified basis.
requirements.object: to one or more other entities because they all have the same shareholder structure without a single controllin

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: For the purpose of these Directions, the norms for recognizing the
promoter group of a banking company shall be applied to recognize the
promoter and promoter group of the person.
requirements.object: the promoter and promoter group of the person

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: 'person' shall also include Private Equity funds, its General Partners
and Limited Partners, investment manager or any other person doing similar
activity of managing funds of one or more persons.
requirements.object: funds, its General Partners and Limited Partners, investment manager or any other person doing similar activity of managin

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: 'Control' shall have the same meaning as defined in Section 2(27) of
Companies Act, 2013- Control shall include the right to appoint majority of the
directors or to control the management or to control policy decisions exercisable
by a person or persons acting individually or in concert, directly or indirectly,
including by virtue of their shareholding or management rights or shareholders
agreements or voting agreements or in any other manner.
requirements.object: as defined in Section 2(27) of Companies Act, 2013- Control shall include the right to appoint majority of the directors or to c

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: Proxy voters shall include Proxy Adviser for one or more persons with
authorisation to exercise voting rights.
requirements.object: one or more persons with authorisation to exercise voting rights

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'applicant' means the person making an application under Section 12B of the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949;
requirements.object: application under Section 12B of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949
as assigned to it in the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) 'major shareholding' means 'aggregate holding' of five per cent or more of the
paid-up share capital or voting rights in a banking company by a person;
requirements.object: per cent or more of the paid-up share capital or voting rights in a banking company by a person

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The shareholding shall be computed assuming that all the instruments
(including convertible instruments) issued/ to be issued to the person have been
converted into shares (with applicable voting rights) and deemed to be included in
the paid-up share capital or total voting rights of the banking company.
requirements.object: all the instruments (including convertible instruments) issued/ to be issued to the person have been converted into shares (

requirements.full_sentence: (6) 'person' means a natural person or a legal person;
requirements.object: a legal person

requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949

requirements.full_sentence:
A banking company shall put in place a board-approved 'fit and proper' criterion for
major shareholders, which shall consider, at a minimum, the criteria mentioned
herein.
requirements.object: board-approved 'fit and proper' criterion for major shareholders, which shall consider, at a minimum, the criteria mentioned herein

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The illustrative criteria for determining 'fit and proper' status of
applicants/major shareholders shall include, at a minimum:
(1) For acquisition of five per cent or more but less than 10 per cent in the banking
company:
requirements.object: (1) For acquisition of five per cent or more but less than 10 per cent in the banking company:

requirements.full_sentence:
Any person who intends to make an acquisition which is likely to result in major
shareholding in a banking company, is required to seek previous approval of the
Reserve Bank by submitting an application, through PRAVAAH, to the Reserve
Bank.
requirements.object: of the Reserve Bank by submitting an application, through PRAVAAH, to the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
On receipt of the application and declaration from the applicant, the Reserve Bank
may seek comments from the banking company on the proposed acquisition.
requirements.object: banking company on the proposed acquisition

requirements.full_sentence:
On receipt of the reference from the Reserve Bank, the Board of Directors (the
Board) of the banking company shall deliberate on the proposed acquisition and
assess the 'fit and proper' status of the person based on the information provided
as well as due diligence undertaken by the banking company, without prejudice to
the generality of the aspects to be considered.
requirements.object: acquisition and assess the 'fit and proper' status of the person based on the information provided as well as due diligence

requirements.timeline:
within 30 days
of receipt of the reference from the Reserve Bank
requirements.full_sentence:
The concerned banking company shall furnish its comments to the Reserve Bank,
after considering all relevant aspects, along with a copy of the relevant board
resolution and information in Form A1 specified in these Directions, within 30 days
of receipt of the reference from the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: the Reserve Bank, after considering all relevant aspects, along with a copy of the relevant board resolution and information i

requirements.full_sentence:
The decision of the Reserve Bank to (i) accord or deny permission or (ii) accord
permission for acquisition of a lower quantum of aggregate holding than that has
been applied for, shall be binding on the applicant and the concerned banking
company.
requirements.object: applicant and the concerned banking company

requirements.full_sentence:
The Reserve Bank may impose such conditions on the applicant and the
concerned banking company as deemed fit while according the permission.
requirements.object: the applicant and the concerned banking company as deemed fit while according the permission

requirements.full_sentence:
The persons from Financial Action Task Force (FATF) non-compliant
jurisdictions shall not be permitted to acquire major shareholding in a banking
company.
requirements.object: major shareholding in a banking company

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (1) FATF non-compliant jurisdictions shall include high-risk
jurisdictions subject to a call for action, and jurisdictions under increased
monitoring.
requirements.object: to a call for action, and jurisdictions under increased monitoring

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (2) The restriction in paragraph 15 shall also apply to various
jurisdictions through which the funds for investments are routed.
requirements.object: jurisdictions through which the funds for investments are routed

requirements.full_sentence:
The existing major shareholders from such FATF non-compliant jurisdictions will,
however, be allowed to continue with their investment, provided that there shall not
be any further acquisition without prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: without prior approval of the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
Reserve
Bank may, however, at any point of time, consider the fitness of such persons
holding shares and pass appropriate orders on their permissible voting rights in
accordance with the law and applicable rules.
requirements.object: point of time, consider the fitness of such persons holding shares and pass appropriate orders on their permissible voting rights in

requirements.full_sentence:
A banking company shall continuously monitor that the following persons are 'fit
and proper' on an ongoing basis:
(1) its major shareholders, including promoter(s) with major shareholding, who
have completed the approved acquisition;
requirements.object: following persons are 'fit and proper' on an ongoing basis: (1) its major shareholders, including promoter(s) with major

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to the requirements in paragraph 17, a banking company shall:
(1) put in place a mechanism to obtain information on a continuous basis on any
changes in the information provided in Form A appended to the 'Guidelines' or
any other development which may have a bearing on the 'fit and proper' status
of major shareholders / applicants;
requirements.object: place a mechanism to obtain information on a continuous basis on any changes in the information provided in Form A appended to the 'Guide

requirements.full_sentence:
A banking company shall put in place a mechanism to obtain information on any
change in Significant Beneficial Owner or acquisition by a person to the extent of
<image>
10 per cent or more of paid-up equity share capital of the major shareholder.
requirements.object: mechanism to obtain information on any change in Significant Beneficial Owner or acquisition by a person to the extent of <image> 10 pe

requirements.full_sentence:
In
seeking the information, the banking company shall also be guided by the
information sought in Form A appended to the 'Guidelines'.
requirements.object: the information sought in Form A appended to the 'Guidelines'

requirements.full_sentence:
Based on the information so received, the concerned banking company shall
conduct requisite due diligence to ascertain whether the major shareholder
continues to be 'fit and proper'.
requirements.object: to ascertain whether the major shareholder continues to be 'fit and proper'

requirements.timeline: within 30 days from receipt of such information
requirements.full_sentence:
A banking company shall submit a brief report on such changes, along with the
Board note and resolution, to Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India,
within 30 days from receipt of such information.
requirements.object: on such changes, along with the Board note and resolution, to Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India, within 30 days fr

requirements.full_sentence:
A banking company shall establish a continuous monitoring mechanism to
ascertain that a major shareholder has obtained prior approval of the Reserve Bank
for the shareholding/voting rights.
requirements.object: mechanism to ascertain that a major shareholder has obtained prior approval of the Reserve Bank for the shareholding

requirements.full_sentence:
Any violation of sub-section (1) of section 12B of
Banking Regulation Act, 1949 shall be immediately brought to the notice of the
Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: the notice of the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: The major shareholder for this purpose shall also include one
acquiring share or entitled to exercise voting rights through invocation of
encumbrance of shares.
requirements.object: share or entitled to exercise voting rights through invocation of encumbrance of shares

requirements.full_sentence:
Even when the acquisition / aggregate holding is less than five per cent of paid-up
share capital or voting rights of a banking company, a reference shall be made to
the Reserve Bank by the banking company along with a copy of board resolution
and necessary documents, if it has reason to believe that the methods adopted are
meant to circumvent the statutory requirements.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank by the banking company along with a copy of board resolution and necessary documents

requirements.full_sentence:
A banking company shall submit periodical reports on the continuous monitoring
arrangements to its Board, which inter alia, shall include assessment of
compliance to sub-section (5) of Section 12B of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
requirements.object: the continuous monitoring arrangements to its Board, which inter alia, shall include assessment of compliance to sub-sect

requirements.timeline:
within 14 days of completion of the
allotment process
requirements.full_sentence:
After issue and allotment of shares, a banking company shall report the details in
the Form A2 specified in these directions within 14 days of completion of the
allotment process.
requirements.object: the Form A2 specified in these directions within 14 days of completion of the allotment process

requirements.full_sentence:
The banking company shall also ensure that the limits approved
by the Reserve Bank for a person shall not be breached.

The banking company shall forward the details on encumbrance of shares reported
by promoter(s) and promoter group, in Form B appended to the 'Guidelines', to the
Department of Supervision, Reserve Bank of India, within one working day.
requirements.object: encumbrance of shares reported by promoter(s) and promoter group, in Form B appended to the 'Guidelines', to the Department of

requirements.timeline: within 30 days from the date of encumbrance of shares
requirements.full_sentence:
The banking company shall place a report on the said encumbrance of shares
before its Board and submit a report to Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank
of India within 30 days from the date of encumbrance of shares.
requirements.object: the said encumbrance of shares before its Board and submit a report to Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India within 30 day

requirements.full_sentence:
The
Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.

major
Major
total voting rights prior
up share capital or
No
shareholding
shareholder
to issue of shares
total voting rights
post issue of shares
Explanation: In case the holding of the major shareholder in percentage of paid-up share capital is different from
the percentage of voting rights of the banking company, the same may be indicated separately.

In terms of sub-section (1) of Section 12B of Banking Regulation Act, 1949, every
person, who intends to acquire shares or voting rights and intends to be a major
shareholder of a banking company, is required to obtain previous approval of the
Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: of the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
While granting approvals, the Reserve Bank may specify conditions under sub-
section (4) of Section 12B of Banking Regulation Act,1949, including a validity
period for completing such acquisition.
requirements.object: section (4) of Section 12B of Banking Regulation Act,1949, including a validity period for completing such acquisition

requirements.full_sentence:
The persons from Financial Action Task Force (FATF) non-compliant
jurisdictions shall not be permitted to acquire major shareholding in the banking
company.
requirements.object: major shareholding in the banking company

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (1) The restriction shall also apply to various jurisdictions through
which the funds for investments are routed.
requirements.object: jurisdictions through which the funds for investments are routed

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation (2) FATF non-compliant jurisdictions shall include high-risk
jurisdictions subject to a call for action, and jurisdictions under increased
monitoring.
requirements.object: to a call for action, and jurisdictions under increased monitoring

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the existing major shareholders from such FATF non-compliant
jurisdictions would be allowed to continue with their investment, provided that there
shall not be any further acquisition without prior approval of the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: without prior approval of the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
The
Reserve Bank may, however, review the 'fit and proper' status of such holders of
shares or voting rights at any point of time and may take steps to limit their voting
rights in accordance with law.
requirements.object: 'fit and proper' status of such holders of shares or voting rights at any point of time and may take steps to limit their voting

requirements.full_sentence:
In addition to furnishing the information sought by the banking company, major
shareholders who have completed the approved acquisition or applicants who
have obtained the approval to have major shareholding or applicants who have
submitted the application for obtaining the prior approval shall inform the banking
company of any change in the information provided in Form A or any other
development which may have a bearing on the 'fit and proper' status.
requirements.object: of any change in the information provided in Form A or any other development which may have a bearing on the 'fit and prope

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: For the purpose of this paragraph, 'approved' shall mean approved
by the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
Permission of the Reserve Bank to acquire shares or voting rights in a banking
company shall be subject to the following limits:
(1) Non-promoter:
Explanation: (a) For the definition of 'Large Industrial Houses,' reference may
be made to the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Licensing)
Guidelines, 2025.
requirements.object: following limits: (1) Non-promoter: Explanation: (a) For the definition of 'Large Industrial Houses,' reference may be made to the R

requirements.full_sentence:
During the period prior to the completion of the 15 years, the promoters of banking
companies may be allowed to hold a higher percentage of shareholding as part of
the licensing conditions or as part of the shareholding dilution plan submitted by
the banking company and approved by the Reserve Bank with such conditions as
deemed fit.
requirements.object: a higher percentage of shareholding as part of the licensing conditions or as part of the shareholding dilution plan submitted by t

requirements.full_sentence:
Reserve Bank may also permit higher shareholding [than the limits prescribed in
paragraph 10 above] on a case-to-case basis under circumstances such as
relinquishment by existing promoters, supervisory intervention including under
<image>
Prompt Corrective Action, reconstruction/restructuring of banks, entrenchment of
existing promoters or any other action in the interest of the banking company and
its depositors or in the interest of consolidation in the banking sector, etc.
requirements.object: [than the limits prescribed in paragraph 10 above] on a case-to-case basis under circumstances such as relinquishment

requirements.full_sentence:
While
allowing such higher shareholding, Reserve Bank may impose conditions as
deemed fit (including dilution of such higher shareholding within a timeline).
requirements.object: fit (including dilution of such higher shareholding within a timeline)

requirements.full_sentence:
In specific cases where State Government / Central Government / Union Territory
/ Public Sector Undertaking / Public Financial Institution / specifically permitted
investors are promoters of banking companies or have been specifically permitted
by Reserve Bank to hold a higher shareholding as promoter/non-promoter in
certain special circumstances, Reserve Bank may prescribe a differentiated
shareholding dilution plan for such holdings.
requirements.object: dilution plan for such holdings

requirements.full_sentence:
In case of a person permitted by the Reserve Bank to have a shareholding of 10
per cent or more of the paid-up equity share capital of the banking company but
less than 40 per cent of the paid-up equity share capital, the shares acquired shall
remain under lock-in for first five years from the date of completion of acquisition.
requirements.object: first five years from the date of completion of acquisition

requirements.full_sentence:
In case of any person permitted to have a shareholding of 40 per cent or more of
the paid-up equity share capital of the banking company, only 40 per cent of paid-
up equity share capital shall remain under lock-in for first five years from the date
of completion of acquisition.
requirements.object: first five years from the date of completion of acquisition

requirements.full_sentence:
The shares which are under lock-in, shall not be encumbered under any
circumstances.
requirements.object: circumstances

requirements.full_sentence:
Promoter(s) and promoter group are required to report details of
creation/invocation/release of encumbrance on shares which are not under lock-in
to the banking company within two working days of such an event in the format
specified in Form B.
requirements.object: creation/invocation/release of encumbrance on shares which are not under lock-in to the banking company within two working days o

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: "Total voting rights" shall include voting rights against all shares
issued by the banking company and is not restricted to 'exercisable' voting rights
arrived at after cutting off the rights beyond the maximum limit that can be
exercised by a single holder.
requirements.object: all shares issued by the banking company and is not restricted to 'exercisable' voting rights arrived at after cutting o

requirements.full_sentence:
The
changes in the depository agreements shall require the prior approval of the
Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: of the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(May be given in a separate annexure)
11 Source of funds for proposed acquisition of aggregate holding in the banking
company (Duly certified by the Chartered Accountant)
12 Total net worth, assets, profitability and average income of the applicant over the
last five years (Duly certified by the Chartered Accountant).
requirements.object: separate annexure) 11 Source of funds for proposed acquisition of aggregate holding in the banking company (Duly certified by the Charte

requirements.full_sentence:
Nature of declaration Declaration/Comments
13 A summary of agreement/shareholder agreement (May be given in annexure with
a copy of the agreement)
14 Whether the applicant or any of the persons / entities listed at Sr.
requirements.object: with a copy of the agreement) 14 Whether the applicant or any of the persons / entities listed at Sr

conditions:
in case the
reversal / setting aside is on technical reasons like limitation or lack of jurisdiction
requirements.full_sentence:
(Though it shall not be necessary for a person to mention in the column about
orders and findings made by regulators which have been later reversed / set
aside in toto, it would be necessary to make a mention of the same in case the
reversal / setting aside is on technical reasons like limitation or lack of jurisdiction,
etc., and not on merit.
requirements.object: person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later reversed / set aside in toto, it

conditions:
If the order of the regulator is temporarily stayed and the
appellate / court proceedings are pending
requirements.full_sentence:
If the order of the regulator is temporarily stayed and the
appellate / court proceedings are pending, the same should also be mentioned).

conditions:
in case the reversal / setting aside is on technical reasons like
limitation or lack of jurisdiction
requirements.full_sentence:
(Though it shall not be necessary for a person to mention in the column
about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later on
reversed / set aside in toto, it would be necessary to make a mention of the
same, in case the reversal / setting aside is on technical reasons like
limitation or lack of jurisdiction, etc, and not on merit.
requirements.object: person to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which have been later on reversed / set aside in toto,

conditions:
If the order of the
regulator is temporarily stayed and the appellate / court proceedings are
pending
requirements.full_sentence:
If the order of the
regulator is temporarily stayed and the appellate / court proceedings are
pending, the same also should be mentioned).

42 Tabulation of details of the date of incorporation, PAN/TAN No., CIN No., DIN
No., Registered Office address, nature of business activity, income tax circle,
name of the regulator, type of registration, if any, bank, branch and account
number (including credit facilities and non-fund based facilities), net worth and
total of the entities listed in 33 above (May be given in a separate annexure).
requirements.object: separate annexure)
